notes: All six NFRs satisfied: NFR-F1-1 (actor + created_at on model, additive migration from S1), NFR-F1-2 (qty < 0 rejected), NFR-F1-3 (upsert in repository), NFR-F1-4 (real branch tests, no mocks), NFR-F1-5 (DB_NAME=stockflow), NFR-F1-6 (null inventory_code renders 'not tracked'). Layering is clean: routes import only the service dependency factory, never Session directly; sorting delegated to the repository (list_all orders by location then sku); models package correctly structured. Design tokens used consistently throughout home.html. No naming, boundary, or IA issues found.
